scripts.demo: npm run cert && npm run experiment:mock
scripts.experiment: concurrently -n https,recorder,monitor -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run serve:https" "bash scripts/run-aura.sh --wss" "sleep 3 && npm run monitor"
scripts.experiment:mock: concurrently -n https,recorder,monitor -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run serve:https" "bash scripts/run-aura.sh --wss --mock-eeg" "sleep 3 && npm run monitor"
